generated.technique: PA and lateral views of the chest
generated.findings: Calcified granulomata are present in the right middle lobe and right upper lobe. Both lungs are free of active infiltrates. Heart size normal. Old right rib fractures.

ground_truth.findings: Heart size and pulmonary vascularity appear within normal limits. Descending thoracic aorta is tortuous. Lungs are free of focal airspace disease. No pleural effusion or pneumothorax is seen. Degenerative changes are present in the spine.
